This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] importKey step: AES-CTR 192-bit key
  assert_unreached: importKey failed for AES-CTR 192-bit key Reached unreachable code
[FAIL] AES-CTR 128-bit key with altered plaintext during call
  assert_true: Should return expected result expected true got false
[FAIL] importKey step: AES-CTR 192-bit key with altered plaintext during call
  assert_unreached: importKey failed for AES-CTR 192-bit key Reached unreachable code
[FAIL] AES-CTR 256-bit key with altered plaintext during call
  assert_true: Should return expected result expected true got false
[FAIL] importKey step: AES-CTR 192-bit key with altered plaintext after call
  assert_unreached: importKey failed for AES-CTR 192-bit key Reached unreachable code
[FAIL] importKey step for decryption: AES-CTR 192-bit key
  assert_unreached: importKey failed for AES-CTR 192-bit key Reached unreachable code
[FAIL] AES-CTR 128-bit key decryption with altered ciphertext during call
  assert_true: Should return expected result expected true got false
[FAIL] importKey step for decryption: AES-CTR 192-bit key with altered ciphertext during call
  assert_unreached: importKey failed for AES-CTR 192-bit key Reached unreachable code
[FAIL] AES-CTR 256-bit key decryption with altered ciphertext during call
  assert_true: Should return expected result expected true got false
[FAIL] importKey step for decryption: AES-CTR 192-bit key with altered ciphertext after call
  assert_unreached: importKey failed for AES-CTR 192-bit key Reached unreachable code
[FAIL] importKey step: AES-CTR 192-bit key without encrypt usage
  assert_unreached: importKey failed for AES-CTR 192-bit key Reached unreachable code
[FAIL] importKey step: AES-CTR 192-bit key with mismatched key and algorithm
  assert_unreached: importKey failed for AES-CTR 192-bit key Reached unreachable code
[FAIL] importKey step: AES-CTR 192-bit key without decrypt usage
  assert_unreached: importKey failed for AES-CTR 192-bit key Reached unreachable code
[FAIL] importKey step: AES-CTR 192-bit key, 0-bit counter
  assert_unreached: importKey failed for AES-CTR 192-bit key, 0-bit counter Reached unreachable code
[FAIL] importKey step: AES-CTR 192-bit key, 129-bit counter
  assert_unreached: importKey failed for AES-CTR 192-bit key, 129-bit counter Reached unreachable code
[FAIL] importKey step: decryption AES-CTR 192-bit key, 0-bit counter
  assert_unreached: importKey failed for AES-CTR 192-bit key, 0-bit counter Reached unreachable code
[FAIL] importKey step: decryption AES-CTR 192-bit key, 129-bit counter
  assert_unreached: importKey failed for AES-CTR 192-bit key, 129-bit counter Reached unreachable code
Harness: the test ran to completion.
